code.name: MCNP
code.notes: Results contributed by Hrvoje Brkic. F4 tally = track-length flux estimate; F6 tally = dose. LET values derived from stopping power via a separate spreadsheet (LET_Calculation.ods).

frame.to_patient: MCPL phase-space source frame (source on the +z side, particles travel -Z toward isocenter), converted to RSSA/SSW for MCNP. depth_Z profiles use the derived depth scalar (measured along -z from the source side). See docs/coordinates.md; verify whether the RSSA/SSW conversion sign-flips travel.

capabilities.notes: Only proton contributions for LET (no secondary particle breakdown). No water-equivalent profiles. No differential spectra. No Qeff. Available: DLET and TLET for all protons along depth (Z_narrow), depth dose (F6), depth fluence of primary protons (F4), and dose/fluence in target volume.

outputs.description: Depth LET profiles in silicon (Z_narrow) – DLET and TLET for all protons
outputs.notes: Page numbering intentionally matches SHIELD-HIT12A convention (p3=DLET protons, p6=TLET protons).

outputs.description: Depth dose profile in silicon (Z_narrow) – F6 tally (dose, MeV/g/SP)
Depth fluence profile in silicon (Z_narrow) – F4 tally, primary particles
outputs.notes: File is named with a 'dose' prefix but contains F4 flux, not dose.

outputs.description: Target volume – dose (F6) and fluence (F4) scalars
outputs.notes: HB_target_01.dat: F4 flux in target (all particles, no filter applied). HB_target_p02.dat: F6 dose in target (MeV/g/SP).
